heading: Health Coaching Across Three Dimensions of You
subtext: Good health isn't just physical. We work with all of who you are: body, mind, and spirit, because all three are connected, and all three matter for how well you live.

dimensions.title: Physical
dimensions.body: How your body moves, functions, and recovers. Strength, fitness, weight, pain, sleep, nutrition, hormones: the tangible, measurable foundation of your health.

dimensions.title: Mental & Emotional
dimensions.body: How you think, feel, and respond to the world. Cognitive sharpness, stress management, emotional resilience, and the relationship between your inner life and your physical health.

dimensions.title: Spiritual
dimensions.body: Meaning, purpose, and connection. Not religious unless you want it to be, but the deeper sense of what makes life feel worthwhile, and why that belongs in a health conversation.

services.title: Strength, Conditioning & Cardio
services.body: Training built specifically for the 50+ body, not adapted from something designed for 30-year-olds. We build strength, protect your joints, improve your cardiovascular health, and keep you moving well for years to come. Your safety is our top priority.

services.title: Nutritional Advice & Support
services.body: Evidence-based guidance tailored to your bloodwork, goals, and the reality of your life. No extreme diets. No one-size-fits-all rules. Just the food habits that actually work for your biology.

services.title: Sleep Advice & Support
services.body: Sleep is the foundation everything else rests on. We assess what's getting in the way, and build practical, sustainable changes to help you sleep more deeply and wake up restored.

services.title: Mobility & Flexibility
services.body: Moving freely, without pain, stiffness, or limitation, is one of the great quiet joys of a healthy body. We work on mobility and flexibility as a core part of your programme, not an afterthought.

services.title: Sexuality Advice & Support
services.body: An often-ignored part of health after 50, and one that matters enormously for quality of life. We create a safe, private space to talk honestly about sexual health, libido, intimacy, and what can help.

services.title: State of Mind & Its Management
services.body: Stress, anxiety, low mood, and the mental weight of a busy life all have real physical consequences. We explore what's contributing, and what changes in thinking, habit, and lifestyle might meaningfully shift things.

services.title: Physiotherapy & Injury Care
services.body: Rehabilitation, chronic pain management, and postural correction from specialists who understand the ageing body. We treat what's hurting now and prevent what might hurt next.

services.title: Medical Coordination
services.body: Access to our vetted network of doctors and specialists, with a concierge who briefs them, follows up on results, and makes sure nothing falls through the cracks of a fragmented healthcare system.
